revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 17 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 17 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月17日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛永]]18年（[[1641年]]_月_日） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（[[1809年]]_月_日） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]_月_日） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== 誕生日 == * [[慶応]]元年（[[1865年]]_月_日） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月16日 (旧暦)|5月16日]] 翌日[[5月18日 (旧暦)|5月18日]] - 前月[[4月17日 (旧暦)|4月17日]] 翌月[[6月17日 (旧暦)|6月17日]] *新暦[[5月17日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）<!-- 閏5月17日ならば新暦7月9日。7月20日（新旧不明）説もあり --> * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951年]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[黄初]]7年（ユリウス暦[[226年]][[6月29日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝、[[曹操]]の子（* [[187年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月27日]]） - [[小関三英]]、[[医者]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1787年]]） * [[慶応]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月6日]]） - [[原田左之助]]、[[新選組]]隊士

== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）<!-- 閏5月17日ならば新暦7月9日。7月20日（新旧不明）説もあり --> * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951年]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）

== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）<!-- 閏5月17日ならば新暦7月9日。7月20日（新旧不明）説もあり --> * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951年]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）

{{Lunar May}} '''Lunar May17日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛永]]18年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1641年]][[6月25日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[6月29日]]） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[6月15日]]） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）<!-- 閏5月17日ならば新暦7月9日。7月20日（新旧不明）説もあり --> * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951年]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[黄初]]7年（ユリウス暦[[226年]][[6月29日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝、[[曹操]]の子（* [[187年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1778年]][[6月11日]]） - [[永谷宗円]]、[[庄屋]]、[[青製煎茶製法]]開発者（* [[1681年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月27日]]） - [[小関三英]]、[[医者]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1787年]]） * [[慶応]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月6日]]） - [[原田左之助]]、[[新選組]]隊士

== Births == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）<!-- 閏5月17日ならば新暦7月9日。7月20日（新旧不明）説もあり --> * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951年]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]7年（ユリウス暦[[226年]][[6月29日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝、[[曹操]]の子（* [[187年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1778年]][[6月11日]]） - [[永谷宗円]]、[[庄屋]]、[[青製煎茶製法]]開発者（* [[1681年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月27日]]） - [[小関三英]]、[[医者]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1787年]]） * [[慶応]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月6日]]） - [[原田左之助]]、[[新選組]]隊士
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}

--> == Events == * [[寛永]]18年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1641年]][[6月25日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[6月29日]]） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[6月15日]]） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== Births == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）<!-- 閏5月17日ならば新暦7月9日。7月20日（新旧不明）説もあり --> * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951年]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]7年（ユリウス暦[[226年]][[6月29日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝、[[曹操]]の子（* [[187年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1778年]][[6月11日]]） - [[永谷宗円]]、[[庄屋]]、[[青製煎茶製法]]開発者（* [[1681年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月27日]]） - [[小関三英]]、[[医者]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1787年]]） * [[慶応]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月6日]]） - [[原田左之助]]、[[新選組]]隊士
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 17日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}

[[sn:May 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[寛永]]18年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1641]][[6月25日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809]][[6月29日]]） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[6月15日]]） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== Births == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1865]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938]]） * 慶応1st year（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945]]）

[[sn:May 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[寛永]]18th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1641]][[6月25日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1809]][[6月29日]]） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[明治]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[6月15日]]） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== Births == * [[寛文]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1668]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1865]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938]]） * 慶応1st year（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951]]） * 慶応2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1866]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]7年（ユリウス暦[[226]][[6月29日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝、[[曹操]]の子（* [[187]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1778]][[6月11日]]） - [[永谷宗円]]、[[庄屋]]、[[青製煎茶製法]]開発者（* [[1681]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839]][[6月27日]]） - [[小関三英]]、[[医者]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1787]]） * [[慶応]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[7月6日]]） - [[原田左之助]]、[[新選組]]隊士

== Events == * [[寛永]]18th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1641]][[6月25日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1809]][[6月29日]]） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[明治]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[6月15日]]） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== Births == * [[寛文]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1668]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1865]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938]]） * 慶応1st year（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951]]） * 慶応2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1866]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]7th year（ユリウス暦[[226]][[6月29日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝、[[曹操]]の子（* [[187]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]7th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1778]][[6月11日]]） - [[永谷宗円]]、[[庄屋]]、[[青製煎茶製法]]開発者（* [[1681]]） * [[天保]]10th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1839]][[6月27日]]） - [[小関三英]]、[[医者]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1787]]） * [[慶応]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[7月6日]]） - [[原田左之助]]、[[新選組]]隊士

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]][[6月25日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]][[6月29日]]） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]][[6月15日]]） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755]]） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938]]） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951]]） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945]]）

[[sn:May 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[6月25日]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[6月29日]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[6月15日]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[6月26日]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[6月10日]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[俳人]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[6月29日]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[6月29日]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代皇帝、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[6月11日]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[6月27日]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[7月6日]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士
== See Also ==

[[sn:May 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[俳人]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代皇帝、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士

[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[俳人]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代皇帝、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士

[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[俳人]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代皇帝、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者}}" to "{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[俳人]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代皇帝、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[俳人]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代皇帝、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages to be translated]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages to be translated]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[俳人]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代皇帝、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[蘭学者]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}

[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代Emperor、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代Emperor、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士 == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}

== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代Emperor、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士 == See Also ==

[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代Emperor、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士

revision.text:
[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代Emperor、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[zh:五月十七]] [[en:draft:May 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代Emperor、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[June 25]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]] に移住させる * [[Bunka]] 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1809]] [[June 29]] ） - [[間宮林蔵]] が[[樺太]] に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]] と名附けられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[June 15]] ） - [[屯田兵]] が[[北海道]] に入植
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1668]] [[June 26]] ） - [[雨森芳洲]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1755]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 10]] ） - [[村上鬼城]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （+ [[1938]] ） * 慶応1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1951]] ） * 慶応2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[June 29]] ） - [[高楠順次郎]] 、[[仏教学者]] （+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[226]] [[June 29]] ） - [[曹丕]] （文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]] の初代Emperor、[[曹操]] の子（* [[187]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1778]] [[June 11]] ） - [[永谷宗円]] 、[[庄屋]] 、[[青製煎茶製法]] 開発者（* [[1681]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 27]] ） - [[小関三英]] 、[[医者]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] （* [[1787]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 6]] ） - [[原田左之助]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1641]] {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of {{ill|Dejima|ja|出島}} in Nagasaki. * [[Bunka]] 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1809]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}) – {{ill|Mamiya Rinzō|ja|間宮林蔵}} crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the {{ill|Mamiya Kaikyō|ja|間宮海峡}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1870]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}}) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1668]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[1755]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1865]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}) – {{ill|Murakami Onikijō|ja|村上鬼城}}, a haiku poet (died [[1938]]). * 慶応1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1865, June 10) – {{ill|Koizumi Matashirō|ja|小泉又次郎}}, a politician (died [[1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1866]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}) – {{ill|Kōkusun Junjirō|ja|高楠順次郎}}, a Buddhist scholar (died [[1945]]).
== Deaths == * [[Huangchu]] 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[226]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}) – {{ill|Cao Pi|ja|曹丕}} (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of {{ill|Cao Cao|ja|曹操}} (born [[187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1778]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日}}) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[1681]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[1787]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日}}) – {{ill|Harada Sano-suke|ja|原田左之助}}, a member of the [[Shinsengumi|新選組]] (birth year unknown).

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1641]] {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of {{ill|Dejima|ja|出島|12=draft}} in Nagasaki. * [[Bunka]] 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1809]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Mamiya Rinzō|ja|間宮林蔵|12=draft}} crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the {{ill|Mamiya Kaikyō|ja|間宮海峡|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1870]] {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft}}) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1668]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|12=draft}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[1755]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1865]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Murakami Onikijō|ja|村上鬼城|12=draft}}, a haiku poet (died [[1938]]). * 慶応1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1865, June 10) – {{ill|Koizumi Matashirō|ja|小泉又次郎|12=draft}}, a politician (died [[1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1866]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kōkusun Junjirō|ja|高楠順次郎|12=draft}}, a Buddhist scholar (died [[1945]]).
== Deaths == * [[Huangchu]] 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[226]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Cao Pi|ja|曹丕|12=draft}} (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of {{ill|Cao Cao|ja|曹操|12=draft}} (born [[187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1778]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=draft}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[1681]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=draft}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[1787]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|July 6|ja|7月6日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Harada Sano-suke|ja|原田左之助|12=draft}}, a member of the [[Shinsengumi|新選組]] (birth year unknown).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十七]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月17日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛永]]18年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1641年]][[6月25日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[6月29日]]） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[6月15日]]） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）<!-- 閏5月17日ならば新暦7月9日。7月20日（新旧不明）説もあり --> * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951年]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[黄初]]7年（ユリウス暦[[226年]][[6月29日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝、[[曹操]]の子（* [[187年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1778年]][[6月11日]]） - [[永谷宗円]]、[[庄屋]]、[[青製煎茶製法]]開発者（* [[1681年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月27日]]） - [[小関三英]]、[[医者]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1787年]]） * [[慶応]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月6日]]） - [[原田左之助]]、[[新選組]]隊士
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[5月17日 (旧暦)]] to [[May 17 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

== できごと == * [[寛永]]18年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1641年]][[6月25日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が平戸のオランダ人を長崎の[[出島]]に移住させる * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[6月29日]]） - [[間宮林蔵]]が[[樺太]]に単身で渡り樺太が島であることを立証。[[間宮海峡]]と名附けられる * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[6月15日]]） - [[屯田兵]]が[[北海道]]に入植
== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[6月26日]]） - [[雨森芳洲]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1755年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月10日]]） - [[村上鬼城]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1938年]]）<!-- 閏5月17日ならば新暦7月9日。7月20日（新旧不明）説もあり --> * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年6月10日） - [[小泉又次郎]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1951年]]） * 慶応2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[6月29日]]） - [[高楠順次郎]]、[[仏教学者]]（+ [[1945年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[黄初]]7年（ユリウス暦[[226年]][[6月29日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝、[[曹操]]の子（* [[187年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1778年]][[6月11日]]） - [[永谷宗円]]、[[庄屋]]、[[青製煎茶製法]]開発者（* [[1681年]]） * [[天保]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1839年]][[6月27日]]） - [[小関三英]]、[[医者]]、[[蘭学者]]（* [[1787年]]） * [[慶応]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月6日]]） - [[原田左之助]]、[[新選組]]隊士
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 17일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十七]][[zh:五月十七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839613]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 17|qq=May 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of [[:en:Dejima|Dejima]] in Nagasaki. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Mamiya Rinzō|Mamiya Rinzō]] crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the [[:en:Strait of Tartary|Mamiya Kaikyō]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|qq=|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1755|1755]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Murakami Kijo|Murakami Onikijō]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1938|1938]]). * 慶応1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1865, June 10) – [[:en:Koizumi Matajirō|Koizumi Matashirō]], a politician (died [[:en:1951|1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Takakusu Junjiro|Kōkusun Junjirō]], a Buddhist scholar (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|qq=|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|qq=|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|qq=|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1755|1755]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Murakami Kijo|Murakami Onikijō]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1938|1938]]). * 慶応1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1865, June 10) – [[:en:Koizumi Matajirō|Koizumi Matashirō]], a politician (died [[:en:1951|1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Takakusu Junjiro|Kōkusun Junjirō]], a Buddhist scholar (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of [[:en:Dejima|Dejima]] in Nagasaki. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Mamiya Rinzō|Mamiya Rinzō]] crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the [[:en:Strait of Tartary|Mamiya Kaikyō]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|qq=|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1755|1755]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Murakami Kijo|Murakami Onikijō]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1938|1938]]). * 慶応1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1865, June 10) – [[:en:Koizumi Matajirō|Koizumi Matashirō]], a politician (died [[:en:1951|1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Takakusu Junjiro|Kōkusun Junjirō]], a Buddhist scholar (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|qq=|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|qq=|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of [[:en:Dejima|Dejima]] in Nagasaki. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Mamiya Rinzō|Mamiya Rinzō]] crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the [[:en:Strait of Tartary|Mamiya Kaikyō]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|qq=|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1755|1755]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Murakami Kijo|Murakami Onikijō]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1938|1938]]). * 慶応1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1865, June 10) – [[:en:Koizumi Matajirō|Koizumi Matashirō]], a politician (died [[:en:1951|1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Takakusu Junjiro|Kōkusun Junjirō]], a Buddhist scholar (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|qq=|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|qq=|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).

== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1755|1755]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Murakami Kijo|Murakami Onikijō]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1938|1938]]). * 慶応1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1865, June 10) – [[:en:Koizumi Matajirō|Koizumi Matashirō]], a politician (died [[:en:1951|1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Takakusu Junjiro|Kōkusun Junjirō]], a Buddhist scholar (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of [[:en:Dejima|Dejima]] in Nagasaki. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Mamiya Rinzō|Mamiya Rinzō]] crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the [[:en:Strait of Tartary|Mamiya Kaikyō]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1755|1755]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Murakami Kijo|Murakami Onikijō]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1938|1938]]). * 慶応1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1865, June 10) – [[:en:Koizumi Matajirō|Koizumi Matashirō]], a politician (died [[:en:1951|1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Takakusu Junjiro|Kōkusun Junjirō]], a Buddhist scholar (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of [[:en:Dejima|Dejima]] in Nagasaki. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Mamiya Rinzō|Mamiya Rinzō]] crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the [[:en:Strait of Tartary|Mamiya Kaikyō]]. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:June 15|June 15]]) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died [[:en:1755|1755]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Murakami Kijo|Murakami Onikijō]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1938|1938]]). * 慶応1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1865, June 10) – [[:en:Koizumi Matajirō|Koizumi Matashirō]], a politician (died [[:en:1951|1951]]). * 慶応2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Takakusu Junjiro|Kōkusun Junjirō]], a Buddhist scholar (died [[:en:1945|1945]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:226|226]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Cao Pi|Cao Pi]] (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of [[:en:Cao Cao|Cao Cao]] (born [[:en:187|187]]). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born [[:en:1681|1681]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born [[:en:1787|1787]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 6|July 6]]) – [[:en:Harada Sanosuke|Harada Sano-suke]], a member of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (birth year unknown).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十七]][[zh:五月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十七]][[zh:五月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十七]][[zh:五月十七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839613]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 17|qq=May 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1641|en|1641|WD=Q6907|lt=1641}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of {{ill|Dejima|en|Dejima|WD=Q640267|lt=Dejima}} in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1809|en|1809|WD=Q6919|lt=1809}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Mamiya Rinzō|en|Mamiya Rinzō|WD=Q952891|lt=Mamiya Rinzō}} crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the {{ill|Strait of Tartary|en|Strait of Tartary|WD=Q110802|lt=Mamiya Kaikyō}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15}}) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1668|en|1668|WD=Q7595|lt=1668}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1755|en|1755|WD=Q7627|lt=1755}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}}) – {{ill|Murakami Kijo|en|Murakami Kijo|WD=Q1618484|lt=Murakami Onikijō}}, a haiku poet (died {{ill|1938|en|1938|WD=Q18645|lt=1938}}). * 慶応1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1865, June 10) – {{ill|Koizumi Matajirō|en|Koizumi Matajirō|WD=Q441491|lt=Koizumi Matashirō}}, a politician (died {{ill|1951|en|1951|WD=Q18591|lt=1951}}). * 慶応2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Takakusu Junjiro|en|Takakusu Junjiro|WD=Q288947|lt=Kōkusun Junjirō}}, a Buddhist scholar (died {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Huangchu|en|Huangchu|WD=Q45313168|lt=Huangchu}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|226|en|226|WD=Q30770|lt=226}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Cao Pi|en|Cao Pi|WD=Q313333|lt=Cao Pi}} (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of {{ill|Cao Cao|en|Cao Cao|WD=Q204077|lt=Cao Cao}} (born {{ill|187|en|187|WD=Q33201|lt=187}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1778|en|1778|WD=Q7713|lt=1778}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6}}) – {{ill|Harada Sanosuke|en|Harada Sanosuke|WD=Q637568|lt=Harada Sano-suke}}, a member of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} (birth year unknown).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|16|5|18|4|17|6|5|0517|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1641|en|1641|WD=Q6907|lt=1641}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of {{ill|Dejima|en|Dejima|WD=Q640267|lt=Dejima}} in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1809|en|1809|WD=Q6919|lt=1809}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Mamiya Rinzō|en|Mamiya Rinzō|WD=Q952891|lt=Mamiya Rinzō}} crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the {{ill|Strait of Tartary|en|Strait of Tartary|WD=Q110802|lt=Mamiya Kaikyō}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15}}) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1668|en|1668|WD=Q7595|lt=1668}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1755|en|1755|WD=Q7627|lt=1755}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}}) – {{ill|Murakami Kijo|en|Murakami Kijo|WD=Q1618484|lt=Murakami Onikijō}}, a haiku poet (died {{ill|1938|en|1938|WD=Q18645|lt=1938}}). * 慶応1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1865, June 10) – {{ill|Koizumi Matajirō|en|Koizumi Matajirō|WD=Q441491|lt=Koizumi Matashirō}}, a politician (died {{ill|1951|en|1951|WD=Q18591|lt=1951}}). * 慶応2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Takakusu Junjiro|en|Takakusu Junjiro|WD=Q288947|lt=Kōkusun Junjirō}}, a Buddhist scholar (died {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Huangchu|en|Huangchu|WD=Q45313168|lt=Huangchu}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|226|en|226|WD=Q30770|lt=226}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Cao Pi|en|Cao Pi|WD=Q313333|lt=Cao Pi}} (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of {{ill|Cao Cao|en|Cao Cao|WD=Q204077|lt=Cao Cao}} (born {{ill|187|en|187|WD=Q33201|lt=187}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1778|en|1778|WD=Q7713|lt=1778}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6}}) – {{ill|Harada Sanosuke|en|Harada Sanosuke|WD=Q637568|lt=Harada Sano-suke}}, a member of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} (birth year unknown).
