== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1668|en|1668|WD=Q7595|lt=1668}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Amamori Hōshū|ja|雨森芳洲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amamori Hōshū|1=Amenomori Hōshū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560770}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1755|en|1755|WD=Q7627|lt=1755}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}}) – {{ill|Murakami Kijo|en|Murakami Kijo|WD=Q1618484|lt=Murakami Onikijō}}, a haiku poet (died {{ill|1938|en|1938|WD=Q18645|lt=1938}}). * 慶応1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1865, June 10) – {{ill|Koizumi Matajirō|en|Koizumi Matajirō|WD=Q441491|lt=Koizumi Matashirō}}, a politician (died {{ill|1951|en|1951|WD=Q18591|lt=1951}}). * 慶応2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Takakusu Junjiro|en|Takakusu Junjiro|WD=Q288947|lt=Kōkusun Junjirō}}, a Buddhist scholar (died {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Huangchu|en|Huangchu|WD=Q45313168|lt=Huangchu}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|226|en|226|WD=Q30770|lt=226}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Cao Pi|en|Cao Pi|WD=Q313333|lt=Cao Pi}} (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of {{ill|Cao Cao|en|Cao Cao|WD=Q204077|lt=Cao Cao}} (born {{ill|187|en|187|WD=Q33201|lt=187}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1778|en|1778|WD=Q7713|lt=1778}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6}}) – {{ill|Harada Sanosuke|en|Harada Sanosuke|WD=Q637568|lt=Harada Sano-suke}}, a member of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} (birth year unknown).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Huangchu|en|Huangchu|WD=Q45313168|lt=Huangchu}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|226|en|226|WD=Q30770|lt=226}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Cao Pi|en|Cao Pi|WD=Q313333|lt=Cao Pi}} (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of {{ill|Cao Cao|en|Cao Cao|WD=Q204077|lt=Cao Cao}} (born {{ill|187|en|187|WD=Q33201|lt=187}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1778|en|1778|WD=Q7713|lt=1778}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – {{ill|Kozeki Sanei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki Sanei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531318}}, a physician and Rangaku scholar (born {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6}}) – {{ill|Harada Sanosuke|en|Harada Sanosuke|WD=Q637568|lt=Harada Sano-suke}}, a member of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} (birth year unknown).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Huangchu|en|Huangchu|WD=Q45313168|lt=Huangchu|1=Huangchu}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|226|en|226|WD=Q30770|lt=226|1=226}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29|1=June 29}}) – {{ill|Cao Pi|en|Cao Pi|WD=Q313333|lt=Cao Pi|1=Cao Pi}} (Wen Emperor), the first Emperor of Wei in the Three Kingdoms period, and son of {{ill|Cao Cao|en|Cao Cao|WD=Q204077|lt=Cao Cao|1=Cao Cao}} (born {{ill|187|en|187|WD=Q33201|lt=187|1=187}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian {{ill|Nagaya Sōen|ja|永谷宗円|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya Sōen|1=Nagatani Sōen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11550354}}, a village headman and developer of the blue-steeped sencha brewing method (born {{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787|1=1787}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|WD=Q2695|lt=July 6|1=July 6}}) – {{ill|Harada Sanosuke|en|Harada Sanosuke|WD=Q637568|lt=Harada Sano-suke|1=Harada == Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1641|en|1641|WD=Q6907|lt=1641|1=1641}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|WD=Q2662|lt=June 25|1=June 25}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate relocated Dutch residents from Hirado to the artificial island of {{ill|Dejima|en|Dejima|WD=Q640267|lt=Dejima|1=Dejima}} in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1809|en|1809|WD=Q6919|lt=1809|1=1809}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29|1=June 29}}) – {{ill|Mamiya Rinzō|en|Mamiya Rinzō|WD=Q952891|lt=Mamiya Rinzō|1=Mamiya Rinzō}} crossed alone to Sakhalin, proving that it was indeed an island; the strait was thereafter named the {{ill|Strait of Tartary|en|Strait of Tartary|WD=Q110802|lt=Mamiya Kaikyō|1=Strait of Tartary}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15|1=June 15}}) – Tondenhei colonists began to settle Hokkaidō.
